name: high-output-management
description: Manage for output using Andrew S. Grove''s "High Output Management": a manager''s output is their organization''s output, raised by choosing high-leverage activities. Use when the user mentions "high output management", "managerial leverage", "one-on-ones", "1:1 agenda", "OKRs", "performance review", "task-relevant maturity", "delegation", "meeting overload", or "new manager". Also trigger when structuring a manager''s calendar and meeting cadence, designing team metrics and indicators, running
author: wondelai
